feedback.text: this topic has been mainly focused on video games and I agree with the sentiments of what people are trying to achieve but I would also like to bring to the attention of the Commission digital media companies like Sky tv. In Ireland as a previous customer of Sky I have bought "Buy and Keep" films from Sky where for a cost similar to that of a DVD or Blu-ray you can buy a digital copy of a film. I used this several times when I was a customer. However when I ended my subscription after about 15 I had to return my Sky equipment and lost access to all of the films I was supposed to be able to keep.
